name: cond-zero-args-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :arity-error :thrown :CondNoBranches :message "cond requires at least one (predicate, branch) pair plus an optional trailing default" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "cond" :args [] :effectful false :text "cond()" :location { :start { :offset 4 :line 1 :column 5 } :end { :offset 10 :line 1 :column 11 } } } :input 5 } :trail [] }

name: cond-one-arg-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :arity-error :thrown :CondNoBranches :message "cond requires at least one (predicate, branch) pair plus an optional trailing default" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "cond" :args [{ :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "eq" :args [{ :qlang/kind :NumberLit :value 5 :text "5" :location { :start { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } :end { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } } }] :effectful false :text "eq(5)" :location { :start { :offset 9 :line 1 :column 10 } :end { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } } }] :effectful false :text "cond(eq(5))" :location { :start { :offset 4 :line 1 :column 5 } :end { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } } } :input 5 } :trail [] }
